name: richer_local
description: Revisit modestly richer local-geometry modeling that was previously too expensive for the old GPU budget.
prompt_extra: Build on the current best boundary-supervision baseline. Make exactly one focused change in train.py. Target only a modestly richer local-geometry block: for example slightly stronger edge features, a carefully chosen extra neighborhood fusion, or a small increase in local capacity. Keep the change contained. Do not redesign the whole model or add deep stacks.
